title: Open Cloze: The Invention of the Telephone

tasks.instruction: Przeczytaj ponizszy tekst. Uzupelnij kazda luke (1.1-1.10) jednym slowem, tak aby powstal spojny i poprawny logicznie oraz gramatycznie tekst.
tasks.text:
The telephone is an invention 1.1. _________ has changed the way people communicate all over the world. It is usually 1.2. _________ to a Scottish-born scientist called Alexander Graham Bell, who was working in the United States. Bell was deeply interested 1.3. _________ sound and in helping deaf people, 1.4. _________ his mother and his wife could not hear. For years he tried to find a way of sending the human voice 1.5. _________ a wire, but he 1.6. _________ not succeed at first.

Then, on 10th March 1876, something remarkable happened. Bell spilt some acid on his clothes and called out 1.7. _________ his assistant, Thomas Watson, who was sitting in another room. Watson heard the words clearly through the machine and rushed back to tell Bell what 1.8. _________ happened. The first real telephone call had been made.

Bell soon patented his invention, and 1.9. _________ a few decades telephones had spread across the world. Today, billions of people 1.10. _________ talk to one another instantly, wherever they happen to be.
